title: Hide/lock Filers
excerpt: Is there a way to hide and/or lock filters? I don’t want others to have the ability to change the filters, and in the case of the widget, it takes up shape from the text.

posts.author: mviquez (Michael Viquez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to hide and/or lock filters? I don’t want others to have the ability to change the filters, and in the case of the widget, it takes up shape from the text.
